title: Consistency Distillation as Augmented-Data ELBO at the Boundary
core_mechanism: Show via Tweedie's formula that CD loss at t→0 equals the ELBO of an augmented model under teacher-score-conditioned augmentation A_θ. Replace consistency-loss with augmented-ELBO directly.
novelty_claim: First derivation that consistency-distillation IS an augmented-data ELBO; boundary instability is a missing augmentation, not a numerical singularity.
signature_terms: boundary regime t to 0 consistency model
